markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review organic growth, refine content strategy, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX content is driving all organic growth,** increasing its share of site traffic while overall site traffic remains flat.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Top-of-funnel content (e.g., salary guides, templates) is a key driver** of qualified leads (SQUOs), challenging the assumption that such content yields low-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**A critical tracking gap prevents measuring content ROI;** GrowthX will now track the `HubSpot form demo request ICP` event to connect content to qualified conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**The engineering content strategy will be refined** to target high-fit segments (Structural, MEP) while accepting "splash damage" from broad terms (Civil) that will be filtered by the demo form.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)

## Topics

### Organic Performance & Content ROI

  - [Overall site traffic is flat, but GrowthX-published content is growing steadily, increasing its share of traffic without cannibalizing existing keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [LLM citations for GrowthX content grew 67%, indicating strong optimization for AI crawlers.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Top-of-funnel content is driving qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Templates:** Drove 6 SQUOs in the last 3 months (3 from "Project Staffing Plan," 3 from "Gantt Chart").](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Salary Guides:** Account for 5 of the top 10 keywords by growth.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [This success challenges the assumption that resource-based content yields only low-intent traffic, validating an "abundance mindset" for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Tracking & Measurement Gap

  - [A critical gap prevents measuring content ROI by connecting organic traffic to qualified conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Problem:** The current GTM setup sends traffic sources to Metabase but lacks a specific conversion event for GrowthX to track.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will now track the `HubSpot form demo request ICP` event, which automatically filters out non-ICP leads, providing a clear signal of qualified intent.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Action:** Jessica will confirm this is the correct event trigger.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Website UX & Authority

  - [**Problem:** Feature/benefits pages have low traffic, with only the "Project Management" page ranking in the top 15.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** This is caused by a vague "Get Started" CTA and an overwhelming navigation menu.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Recommendation:**](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Homepage CTAs:** Use clear, above-the-fold CTAs linking directly to feature pages.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
      - [**Navigation:** Simplify the menu to reduce decision fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**CTA A/B Test:** Test the "Get Started" button with more specific copy (e.g., "Request a Demo").](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** Create author pages to build authority and improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Structure:** A main author index page → individual author bio pages.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Action:** Update all past articles with author links during content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Engineering Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Refine the engineering content strategy based on ICP fit.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [**High-Fit Segments:** Structural, Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing (MEP) engineering firms.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
  - [**Low-Fit Segments:**](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
      - [**Civil Engineering (Govt-funded):** Poor fit due to complex, non-cloud-friendly invoicing and contracting workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
      - [**Surveyors/Contractors:** Poor fit due to short engagement cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [**Decision:** Continue targeting broad engineering terms (e.g., "Civil Engineer") to capture top-of-funnel traffic, accepting "splash damage" from non-ICP leads. These leads will be filtered by the demo form's routing logic.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Any content effort for Civil Engineering must be matched by a similar effort for Structural Engineering, a proven high-conversion segment.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

### Reddit & Content Repurposing

  - [GrowthX is now posting content on Reddit via the `u/Monograph` user account.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [The `r/Monograph` subreddit was secured to prevent squatting but is inactive.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Managing a subreddit requires significant resources (moderation, curation) that are not available.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Jessica will repurpose top-performing content for LinkedIn ads and newsletters.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [**Test Plan:** Run campaigns for both proven content and new AI-focused content to prime the audience for the upcoming AI product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
      - [Confirm `HubSpot form demo request ICP` is the correct conversion trigger.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Work with Ops next week to grant GrowthX access to the conversion tracking dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [Create author pages and update past articles with author links.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [Repurpose top-performing content (AI, salary guides) for LinkedIn ads and newsletters.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
      - [Investigate the Reddit \<\> G2 integration for potential opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
      - [Build a Looker dashboard to track the `HubSpot form demo request ICP` event.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Send Robert 3 key performance highlights for the board deck.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2319.0)
      - [Refine the engineering keyword strategy based on ICP fit criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/HboDfhxPy4Hyj1qcyax-LonYeKQcWoP-?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
